channel.title: Language Agent on Sukai Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Language Agent on Sukai Huang

item.title: Jiuzhou Towards Uncertainty Aware Lang Agent 2024
item.description: [TOC] Title: Towards Uncertainty Aware Language Agent Author: Jiuzhou Han et. al. Publish Year: 30 May 2024 Review Date: Thu, Jun 20, 2024 url: arXiv:2401.14016v3 Summary of paper Motivation The existing approaches neglect the notion of uncertainty during these interactions Contribution Some key terms Related work 1: lang agent the author define what is language agent and discuss it – the prominent work of ReAct propose a general language agent framework to combine reasoning and acting with LLMs for solving diverse language reasoning tasks.
